Package org.eventb.core.basis

Class SCEvent

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.PlatformObject
org.rodinp.core.basis.RodinElement
org.rodinp.core.basis.InternalElement
org.eventb.core.basis.EventBElement
org.eventb.core.basis.SCEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IAccuracyElement, IConvergenceElement, ILabeledElement, ISCEvent, ITraceableElement, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
public class SCEvent extends EventBElement implements ISCEvent
Implementation of Event-B SC events as an extension of the Rodin database.

This class is intended to be subclassed by clients that want to extend this internal element type.

This class should not be used in any other way than subclassing it in a database extension. In particular, clients should not use it, but rather use its associated interface ISCEvent.

Since:
1.0

      Returns an array of all SC refines clauses of this SC event.

      Returns:

    • getAbstractSCEvents

      public ISCEvent[] getAbstractSCEvents() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: ISCEvent
      Returns an array of all SC events refined by this SC event.

      This is a convenience method. It fetches all refines clauses of this events and gets the handles of the abstract events from there.

      Specified by:
      getAbstractSCEvents in interface ISCEvent
      Returns:
      an array of all abstract SC events
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or one abstract SC event is invalid

      Returns:

    • getSCAction

      public ISCAction getSCAction(String elementName)
      Description copied from interface: ISCEvent
      Returns a handle to a child SC action with the given element name.

      This is a handle-only method. The child element may or may not be present.

      Specified by:
      getSCAction in interface ISCEvent
      Parameters:
      elementName - element name of the SC action
      Returns:
      a handle to a child SC action with the given element name

    • getTypeEnvironment

      public ITypeEnvironmentBuilder getTypeEnvironment(ITypeEnvironment mchTypenv) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: ISCEvent
      Returns the type environment of this event, given the type environment of its parent machine. The returned type environment is made of a copy of the given machine type environment together with all the local variables defined in this event. The given type environment is not modified by this method.

      The returned type environment can be used subsequently to type-check the guards and actions of this event. It might not be appropriate for type-checking the witnesses of this event.

      Specified by:
      getTypeEnvironment in interface ISCEvent
      Parameters:
      mchTypenv - type environment of the parent machine
      Returns:
      the type environment of this event
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or computing the type environment
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • ISCMachineRoot.getTypeEnvironment()
